info.name: data-exchange-uc1-meter-data.vc-validation
info.description: Exercises the DEG vcvalidator middleware with a did:web Verifiable Credential issued by OpenCred 1.9.0 (issuer did:web:ameetdesh.github.io:ies-did, did.json on GitHub Pages). Valid case flows through the BAP caller (signed) -> ACK; negatives post directly to the BPP receiver, where vcvalidator NACKs before signature/schema validation. Run the data-exchange devkit first (install/: docker compose up -d). CLI equivalent: workflows/run-vc-validation.sh.

request.description: OpenCred-issued MeterDataRequestCredential; vcvalidator resolves the did:web doc, verifies the ES256 JWT, then the pipeline ACKs.
